title: Amazzing's Crystal PvP
description: A simple, optimized resource pack that offers easier placement of crystals to users. Basically, easier to play.
body:
Amazzing's Crystal PvP is a lightweight, performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed specifically for End Crystal PvP. It combines Marlow’s Crystal Optimizer with carefully selected optimization and quality-of-life mods to deliver smoother combat, lower latency, and better control in high-intensity PvP situations.

 MAIN FEATURES

Crystal Optimizations
Uses Marlow’s Crystal Optimizer to improve crystal placement, detonation handling, and overall combat responsiveness.

FPS Optimizations
Includes multiple optimization mods that reduce lag, improve frame stability, and ensure consistent performance during large crystal fights. This is still compatible with Lunar Client.

Clean, Competitive QoL Enhancements
Quality of life mods focused on PvP usability no unfair advantages, just smoother gameplay and better visibility.

Lightweight & Server-Friendly
Utilizes many good client mods to stay minimal and efficient, making it suitable for competitive servers and long PvP sessions.

Stability
Mods are chosen for compatibility and reliability to avoid crashes and desync during combat.

Who This Modpack Is For?

Competitive Crystal PvP players

Players who want maximum performance without clutter

Anyone looking for a smooth, responsive PvP experience

This modpack does not use hacks or exploit-based mods in ANY way. It only focuses on optimization, stability, and quality gameplay to help you perform at your best in crystal combat
